On this page

  • Overview
  • Options
  • Output
  • See also

skillmaker status

Rebuilds the SQLite index, then prints one bundle’s full known state: its identity, its production stage/substate, file hashes, drift, the latest recorded version, fixture/coverage counts, and its most recent journal event.

Options

Section titled “Options”
FlagMeaning
--jsonEmit machine-readable JSON instead of text

Output

Section titled “Output”

See also

Section titled “See also”
  • The journal — why this is always a fresh replay, never stale state.
  • Versions and drift — what drift means.
